query:
SELECT 
  ssm.supplier_name,
  ssm.supplier_service_id,
  ssm.supplier_service_name,
  ssm.monthly_cost,
  ssm.monthly_revenue,
  ssm.match_confidence,
  ssm.notes,
  ssm.customer_external_id,
  ssm.last_invoice_date
FROM supplier_service_map ssm
WHERE ssm.supplier_service_name LIKE '%Voice Support%'
   OR ssm.supplier_service_id LIKE '%Voice Support%'
ORDER BY ssm.supplier_service_name
LIMIT 20;
